name: password-manager
description: Local-first desktop password manager built with Electron, React, and SQLite.
author: lugep

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n api,web -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build:api && concurrently -n web,electron -c cyan,green "npm run dev:web" "npm --workspace apps/electron run dev"
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace apps/web run dev
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace apps/api run dev
scripts.build:web: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.build:api: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace apps/api run build
scripts.build:electron: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace apps/electron run build
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && npm run build:electron
scripts.package:desktop: npm run build:desktop && electron-builder --win nsis portable
